title: Adapter Contract v1 schema verification
scope: Verify that Adapter Contract v1 remains represented as public schemas and documentation after executable conformance code moved out of the public repository.
preconditions: Adapter schemas are present under schemas/adapter/v1/.
procedure: Confirm Adapter Contract v1 schema files remain present.
Confirm executable adapter conformance source is absent from the public repository.
Confirm documentation describes adapters as implementation-owned participants.
expected_result: Adapter Contract v1 remains a public contract surface without public executable conformance code.
